title: Bitter Shattering Norwegian Sausage Gratin
description: An indulgent and rich Norwegian-inspired dish featuring Norwegian sausage, double-fried in a KFC-style batter, topped with a bitter sweet potato and cauliflower gratin. Perfect for sugar-free diets.

ingredients.name: Double Fry KFC Breading
ingredients.notes: make sure to dry the sausages before the second fry

instructions: Fry the Norwegian sausages in the Double Fry KFC breading until golden brown, in batches if necessary.
In a separate pan, sauté the sliced sweet potatoes until slightly caramelized.
Transfer the sweet potatoes to a baking dish, creating a layer.
Top the sweet potatoes with the cauliflower florets.
In a small saucepan, melt the butter and mix with the Furikake.
Pour the Furikake butter mixture over the cauliflower.
Place the fried sausages on top of the cauliflower, slightly overlapping.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Garnish with shaved Grana Padano and black pepper to taste.
